creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
anders      2010-03-23 21:38:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  Update to 2.5.
  Disable checks for hoard and tcmalloc.
  Make pcre on by default.
  Honor CC.
  Portlint.

  Submitted by:   mm
